message:
🐛 Fix XSS vulnerability and WS panic recovery cleanup (#4620)

- Sanitize SVG via DOMPurify before dangerouslySetInnerHTML in
  ClusterLocations to prevent XSS from embedded scripts (#4592)
- Send error frame to WebSocket client on panic recovery in chat
  and kubectl handlers so frontend doesn't spin forever (#4608)

Note: #4607 (missing rel="noopener noreferrer") and #4598/#4599/#4600
(uncaught JSON.parse) were already fixed in the current codebase.

Fixes #4592
Fixes #4608

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
